title: Big Globe x YUNG's Cave Biomes
description: Adds YUNG's Cave Biomes to Big Globe worlds.
body: Integrates YUNG's Cave Biomes' Frosted Caves into the existing Frozen Cave of Big Globe, and adds the Lost Cave biome. Requires both [YUNG's Cave Biomes](https://modrinth.com/mod/yungs-cave-biomes) and [Big Globe](https://modrinth.com/mod/big-globe).
